name: LPPHK — Le Petit Prince in Cantonese (Older Adults)
description: OpenNeuro dataset (ds004718) of 46 older Cantonese-speaking adults listening to 'The Little Prince' during fMRI. A naturalistic language resource extending Le Petit Prince to Cantonese and ageing populations.
citation: Momenian M, et al. (2024). Le Petit Prince Hong Kong (LPPHK): naturalistic fMRI and behavioral dataset. Scientific Data, 11, 992.
